Imagine AI

Mobile AI art generator with diverse artistic styles

5/10Overall Rating
7/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2022Founded
Free Plan Available

About Imagine AI

Imagine AI is a ai image generation platform founded in 2022. It positions itself as “Mobile AI art generator with diverse artistic styles” and is best suited for mobile art, social media, avatars, quick generation. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To ImageYes
Image To ImageNo
InpaintingYes
OutpaintingNo
UpscalingNo
Style TransferYes
Batch GenerationNo
Api AccessNo
Commercial LicenseNo
Custom ModelsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Good mobile experience
  • Many art style options
  • Free tier available

Cons

  • Quality inconsistent across styles
  • Heavy ads on free version
  • Limited advanced features
